title: eragrostis guatemalensis
intro: Eragrostis guatemalensis, also known as Guatemala love grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis guatemalensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
